content: ASP.NET Core MVC Areas: create Areas/<AreaName>/Controllers/ and Areas/<AreaName>/Views/ structure. Decorate controller with [Area('AreaName')]. Add area route in Program.cs before default route: app.MapControllerRoute('MyArea', '{area:exists}/{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}'). Authorization: apply [Authorize(Policy='SuperAdminOnly')] to the controller class. View discovery searches /Areas/<Area>/Views/<Controller>/<Action>.cshtml first. ViewImports.cshtml from /Views/ does not apply to areas by default — add one under Areas/<Area>/Views/. Use asp-area in tag helpers to generate area-aware links.
